title: Copy values from one column to another in sub-items
excerpt:
How can I create an automatio for copy subitems column A to another subitem columns B when sub-item A changes? 
Use case: I want to calculate in sub-item B the date with 60 days push but allow the user to change sub-item…

posts.author: TheKribus (Michael Kribus)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I create an automatio for copy subitems column A to another subitem columns B when sub-item A changes?

Use case: I want to calculate in sub-item B the date with 60 days push but allow the user to change sub-item B if needed

Thanks

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TheKribus,

If subitem B is the next item after subitem A you can use the following automation from our Subitems Pro Automations app to achieve that:

image351×268 8.29 KB

If the source column is mirror or formula column we have the special automations supporting them as well.

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!
